allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/appointment -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hearing test tomorrow at 11am. Rahul Sharma, rahul.sharma@gmail.com"}]}')
